uplink.description: Water event — water present (leak detected), relative level 200
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived via ORACLE (running reference/upstream-codec.js): byte[2]=0 -> 'Water Present' -> water.leak=true, byte[3]=200 -> waterRelative.

uplink.description: Water event — water not present (leak cleared), relative level 0
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived via ORACLE: byte[2]=1 -> 'Water Not Present' -> water.leak=false, byte[3]=0 -> waterRelative.

uplink.description: Supervisory event — battery 3.6V, no faults, accumulation 5
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived via ORACLE: byte[4]=0x36 -> Battery '3.6V' -> battery 3.6 V; byte[2]=0 flags clear; byte[9..10]=0,5 -> accumulation 5. Provides battery for the water-leak category.

uplink.description: Unsupported message type 0x0d (ATH event not handled by this water sensor)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; type byte 0x0d is a valid RadioBridge event but not a water-sensor message, so this codec rejects it with an error.
